positive: A highly detailed, ornate mandala-style illustration centered on a mystical crescent moon and intertwining celestial elements. Incorporate stylized constellations, ethereal galaxies, and blooming nebula flora, rendered in a fine-line engraving style with strong Art Nouveau symmetry. The composition must feature clean, solid silhouettes against negative space, ensuring maximum print readability. Use a deep sapphire blue and brilliant metallic gold palette for high contrast. Perfect for central placement on apparel. Minimalist yet intricate, evoking timeless magic and cosmic wonder.
